title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi is desperate to find a clinching proof against Pawan and he finds the ideal counsellors, Manpreet and Yuvi. The two brothers break into Pawan's house in search of evidence, while Tanvi makes a discovery that could well seal Pawan's fate.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Tanu calls Rishi and tells him about Pawan and Saloni' affair, however, she is unsure about it. Rishi is over the moon, when Manpreet discovers Pawan and Saloni's marriage licence. Did Rishi just get his trump card?

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi is both surprised and elated when Rano praises Tanvi's virtues and broaches the idea of him marrying Tanvi. However, Rano has other plans in mind as she schemes to deceive Rishi and Raj, break the engagement and rekindle her American dream.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rano and Raj discuss breaking up Rishi and Neha's wedding, however, Neha and Bani eavesdrop on their conversation. An excited Rishi hugs Neha when she says that Tanu should marry him, and Rano sees them in the process. How will Rano react to this?

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi leaves Tanushree in shock and proposes to her, forcing his father to insist on their marriage by pretending to use their union to obtain a sports car. However, Rano is distraught with Rishi for using her voice recording to achieve his goal.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi decides to go to Amritsar to find evidence against Pawan. Meanwhile, Pawan, on his mother's request goes with Saloni to give Tanu some gifts, but finds it fishy as Rishi is not to be seen and his phone is switched off.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Pawan's plan to enter Rishi's room works and he searches for evidence that can help him locate Rishi. Will he manage to find any clues? Meanwhile, Rishi and Manpreet reach Amritsar and look for the temple in which Pawan and Saloni got married.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Tanvi suspects Pawan to have entered Rishi's room and she informs Rishi about it. Later, when Rishi and Manpreet meet the pandit who performed Pawan and Saloni's wedding, they get enough evidence to prove Pawan's deception.
